title: Find Missing Sequence Numbers
description: Identify missing numbers in a sequence of order ids.
sql_solution: SELECT a.id + 1 AS missing_id FROM orders a LEFT JOIN orders b ON a.id + 1 = b.id WHERE b.id IS NULL AND a.id < (SELECT MAX(id) FROM orders);
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

max_id = orders.agg(max("id").alias("max_id"))

result = (
    orders.alias("a")
    .join(orders.alias("b"), col("a.id") + lit(1) == col("b.id"), "left")
    .crossJoin(max_id)
    .filter(col("b.id").isNull() & (col("a.id") < col("max_id")))
    .select((col("a.id") + lit(1)).alias("missing_id"))
)
